KlipperView

No active print file.

Mode: Live
Layer -- Layer 1

Connect and start a print to load KlipperView.

Timelapse Recorder

Control the background recorder service that captures full-print videos and builds timelapses.

State Unknown

Connect to Moonraker to query service state.

External recorder mode skips Moonraker service checks. Run the recorder script from your host terminal.

Recorder output folders are configured in your timelapse recorder JSON config.

Connection

Camera Settings

Main Camera

Toolhead Cam

Interface

Theme colors apply instantly and stay local to this browser.

Image is fixed to viewport and does not move while scrolling.

Macros

Fluidd-style category and macro controls. Macro gcode definitions are not edited.

Categories

No macro categories.

No macros loaded yet.

These preferences are stored locally in Forge only.

Warnings

Warn if CPU throttling is detected

CPU throttling can cause prints to fail.

Warn if stepper driver is over-heating
